name: @agentkit/ui
description: Reusable, domain-blind React component kit extracted from GridIQ (Tier-2). Styling driven entirely by the central Tailwind preset + CSS-var token contract.
comment: Source package — consumed by the host app (app/frontend) via the @agentkit-ui/* path alias (tsconfig paths + vite resolve.alias). Not npm-published; all peer deps are provided by the host's node_modules. The exports map documents the public surface; resolution is via the alias, not this field.
